CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Doctor_Account','רופא', IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Surgeons_Group',"קבוצת מנתחים", IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Psychotherapist',"רופא", IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Secretary_Contact',"מזכירה", "מטופל" ))))
CustomField.label: Record Type Account
